name: Fujiwara no Mokou, the (why is she) now-busty Figure of Hourai
description:
Soooo! Seems as if you got yourself lost in the Bamboo Forest of the Lost, huh? I wonder why. Either way, you know you can count on Mokou, the guide of the forest, to take you outta there. She must be just around this corner... hold on, that's her????

i am literally getting out of creativity

I also suddenly felt like adding that "busty figure of hourai" for character emphasis

also woah its the tomboy touhou (14th bot)

finally a touhou bot that's not specifically made for smut chats???? must be cool (you can do naughtsies too idrc)

This bot made it to the 2nd touhou page. Honestly, thank you all. I only started making bots for the sake of a side hobby, but damn I did not expect to get relatively popular. This might be the last thanks message since I don't like doing those much.

Full art by bsm(nerdmin), found in Danbooru.

I lost the fricking image nooooooooo

Update 12/20: changed intro message, bot should respond less for the user.
